modalCreatePresetLayout.title: Copy Function
modalCreatePresetLayout.content1: The same preset layout code + reservation date already exists at the following stores.
modalCreatePresetLayout.content2: Do you want to add it as a new preset layout code?
modalCreatePresetLayout.content3: Please choose whether to overwrite it.
modalCreatePresetLayout.content4: (You cannot select overwrite data that is the same as the source data.)
